repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: The dating of this manuscript by Aleksidze, et al. is now called into question because of the erased undertexts of later date
Codex incomplete at beginning and end | Unbound quires, stitching largely intact | All folios very dark and stiff, fragmentary folios at front and back
Pencil foliation beginning with 1 at top center (followed here); irregular alternative foliation in outer margin, not followed here; foliation in pencil, bottom (not followed)
